$comment: This file is generated via firehose. DO NOT edit by hand. Make any changes required using the firehose repo instead.
title: measurementSatnav
description: Raw measurements from a satnav receiver.

timeOfValidity.description: time_of_validity: Time at which the measurement is considered to be valid.

receiverClockTime.description: receiver_clock_time: Receiver clock time.  In a multi-GNSS receiver (GPS/GLONASS/Galileo/QZSS/BeiDou) all pseudorange observations must refer to one receiver clock only.   The receiver clock time of the measurement is the receiver clock time of the received signals.  It is identical for the phase and range measurements and is identical for all satellites observed in a given epoch.

numSignalTypes.description: num_signal_types: Number of different signal types tracked in the current epoch.  Examples of signal types include GPS L1 C/A code, Galileo E1B.

numSignalsTracked.description: num_signals_tracked: Total number of signals tracked across all PRNs and signal types.

obs.description: obs: Array of satnav obs data for all of the signals/PRNs being tracked in this epoch.

integrity.description: integrity: Measurement integrity at the sensor level.  Integrity is also available for each observable, which is found in the observable type definition.  Includes the integrity method used and an integrity value (which is to be interpreted based upon the integrity method).  The intent of allowing num_integrity > 1 is to report multiple integrity values based on multiple integrity methods.
